format.raw: Dec 27 $TIME FGT-A-LOG CEF:0|Fortinet|Fortigate|v6.0.3|00013|traffic:forward close|3|deviceExternalId=$DEVICE_ID FTNTFGTlogid=0000000013 cat=traffic:forward FTNTFGTsubtype=forward FTNTFGTlevel=notice FTNTFGTvd=vdom1 FTNTFGTeventtime=$EPOCH src=$SRC_IP spt=$SRC_PORT deviceInboundInterface=port12 FTNTFGTsrcintfrole=undefined dst=$DST_IP dpt=$DST_PORT deviceOutboundInterface=port11 FTNTFGTdstintfrole=undefined FTNTFGTpoluuid=c2d460aa-fe6f-51e8-9505-41b5117dfdd4 externalId=$CONN_ID proto=6 act=$ACTION FTNTFGTpolicyid=$POLICY_ID FTNTFGTpolicytype=policy app=HTTPS FTNTFGTdstcountry=United States FTNTFGTsrccountry=Reserved FTNTFGTtrandisp=snat sourceTranslatedAddress=172.16.200.1 sourceTranslatedPort=$SRC_PORT FTNTFGTduration=2 out=3652 in=146668 FTNTFGTsentpkt=58 FTNTFGTrcvdpkt=105 FTNTFGTutmaction=$ACTION FTNTFGTcountapp=2

xml.raw:
<Policy>
  <Parser parser_key="{@parser_key}" type="1" separator="CEF" version="0" arr_length="-1">
    <Field position="0" name="device_version" />
    <Field position="1" name="device_product" />
    <Field position="2" name="dstn_ip" org_name="dst" />
    <Field position="3" name="FTNTFGTpoluuid" />
    <Field position="4" name="FTNTFGTtrandisp" />
    <Field position="5" name="FTNTFGTsentpkt" />
    <Field position="6" name="FTNTFGTapprisk" />
    <Field position="7" name="FTNTFGTappcat" />
    <Field position="8" name="deviceExternalId" />
    <Field position="9" name="deviceOutboundInterface" />
    <Field position="10" name="out" />
    <Field position="11" name="FTNTFGTapp" />
    <Field position="12" name="signature_id" />
    <Field position="13" name="FTNTFGTeventtime" />
    <Field position="14" name="act" />
    <Field position="15" name="FTNTFGTsubtype" />
    <Field position="16" name="deviceInboundInterface" />
    <Field position="17" name="FTNTFGTpolicytype" />
    <Field position="18" name="cat" />
    <Field position="19" name="FTNTFGTpolicyid" />
    <Field position="20" name="FTNTFGTlevel" />
    <Field position="21" name="FTNTFGTvd" />
    <Field position="22" name="severity" />
    <Field position="23" name="app" />
    <Field position="24" name="attack_nm" />
    <Field position="25" name="src_ip" org_name="src" />
    <Field position="26" name="in" />
    <Field position="27" name="sourceTranslatedPort" />
    <Field position="28" name="FTNTFGTsrccountry" />
    <Field position="29" name="FTNTFGTdstintfrole" />
    <Field position="30" name="FTNTFGTduration" />
    <Field position="31" name="dstn_port" org_name="dpt" />
    <Field position="32" name="externalId" />
    <Field position="33" name="cef_version" />
    <Field position="34" name="sourceTranslatedAddress" />
    <Field position="35" name="FTNTFGTdstcountry" />
    <Field position="36" name="src_port" org_name="spt" />
    <Field position="37" name="prtc" org_name="proto" />
    <Field position="38" name="FTNTFGTutmaction" />
    <Field position="39" name="FTNTFGTapplist" />
    <Field position="40" name="device_vendor" />
    <Field position="41" name="FTNTFGTcountapp" />
    <Field position="42" name="FTNTFGTlogid" />
    <Field position="43" name="FTNTFGTsrcintfrole" />
    <Field position="44" name="FTNTFGTappid" />
    <Field position="45" name="FTNTFGTrcvdpkt" />
    <Field position="46" name="vendor" convert_tag="[[@set('fortinet')]]" />
    <Field position="47" name="model" convert_tag="[[@set('fgt')]]" />
    <Field position="48" name="logtype" convert_tag="[[@set('traffic')]]" />
    <Field position="49" name="parser_version" convert_tag="[[@set('v1')]]" />
    <Field position="50" name="original_log" convert_tag="[[@originalLog()]]" />
    <Field position="51" name="parser_info" convert_tag="[[@set('[Fortinet]_fgt_traffic_v1_cef')]]" />
    <Field position="52" name="eqp_type" convert_tag="[[@set('fw')]]" />
  </Parser>
</Policy>
